old_behavior: Accepted a preplanned FFET after predecessor mutations.
proposed_behavior: Require a fresh JIT supersession whenever predecessor closeout changes Product main.

decision_upskill.decision_context: H10-F02 started after H10-F01 changed Product main.
rejected_alternatives: Use the original planned FFET anyway
Treat the stale base as harmless
decision_upskill.decision_failure: A preplanned FFET can become stale even when its scope remains correct.
decision_upskill.corrected_rule: Supersede stale planned FFETs with fresh JIT execution records before Product mutation.
decision_upskill.future_stop_or_ask_condition: Stop if the current Product SHA differs from the FFET freshness basis.
regression_checklist: compare FFET base to current main

promotion_gate.status_reason: Decision upskill structure is fixture-backed only.
